race.comment: DEEP PLEASURE (4) set to peak fourth-up and she gets a much better set-up from the low draw. Strong through the line when fifth over 1300m on a heavy track at Warwick Farm in this class. Will go forward today and prove hard to run down. CONCORDIA WIND (6) handy mare who looks to have strengthened over the break after her eye-catching first-up second over 1250m at Canterbury. Proven second-up winner who gets out to her right trip. SISTER DAAE (9) drops in weight for this second-up after she was strong through the line with a respectable fourth over 1400m at Newcastle in BM64 grade. Since kept up to the mark with a 900m trial at Rosehill. Comes here at the right time with the key jockey change. VIRGIL'S GIFT (8) best form is over this trip and was never a chance first-up from the wide gate with a battling sixth over 1100m at this track. Since fitted with a 1080m synthetic trial placing at Randwick. Can return to form from the low draw.
